steps.title: Identify the singular antecedent
steps.content: The blank needs a pronoun referring to The Aeneid, which is a singular noun. This pronoun must also be possessive, since it modifies “compelling narrative.”

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must match its antecedent in number. Its is the singular possessive pronoun needed here. The other choices violate number agreement or don't function as possessive pronouns. That matches choice C — C is correct.
